title: mentha suaveolens var. reverchonii
intro: Mentha suaveolens var. reverchonii, also known as pineapple mint, is a subspecies of the Mentha suaveolens plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains menthone, menthyl acetate, and pinene. The health benefits of pineapple mint include its potential to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Pineapple mint can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its therapeutic benefits.
